programs.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programs.desc: Andy travels back 145 million years to the time of Allosaurus - a massive meat-eating dinosaur that roamed the salt flats of North America.

programs.title: Mojo Swoptops
programs.desc: A big duck statue needs pulling up treacherous Swoppiton Hill. Will Mojo and Bo make it?

programs.title: Ariel
programs.desc: Triton accidentally turns into a kid.

programs.title: Bluey
programs.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programs.title: Peppa Pig:
programs.desc: After finding out Daddy Pig has a place in the London Marathon, Peppa and George help Daddy Pig become stronger with lots of different, though not typical, exercises.

programs.title: Peppa Pig:
programs.desc: Peppa and George go behind the scenes to find out how TV is made when Miss Rabbit shows them around the set of Super Potato's TV show.
